title: Vitrectomy lens ring
abstract: Vitrectomy lens ring with a ring shaped support (2) for a vitrectomy lens(4) and at least two legs(6) extending radially from the ring shaped support (2) having a predetermined length. The ring shaped support (2) and the at least two legs (6) comprise a dome shaped inner surface(8). The dome shaped inner surface (8) part of the at least two legs (6) is provided with a friction enhancing surface structure(10), the friction enhancing surface structure (10) comprising a surface texture with a surface roughness R a of between 0.4Âµm (VDI3400 12) and 18Âµm (VDI3400 45).
claims: Claims 1. Vitrectomy lens ring, comprising a ring shaped support (2) for a vitrectomy lens (4), at least two legs (6) extending radially from the ring shaped support (2) having a predetermined length, wherein the ring shaped support (2) and the at least two legs (6) comprise a dome shaped inner surface (8), and wherein the dome shaped inner surface (8) part of the at least two legs (6) is provided with a friction enhancing surface structure (10), the friction enhancing surface structure (10) comprising a surface texture with a surface roughness Ra of between 0.4Î¼Î¹Î· and 18 Î¼Î¹Î·, e.g. a surface roughness Ra of 2.2Î¼Î¹Î·. 2. Vitrectomy lens ring according to claim 1 , wherein the friction enhancing surface structure (10) further comprises one or more protrusions (1 1). 3. Vitrectomy lens ring according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the friction enhancing surface structure (10) further comprises one or more perforations (12) in the at least two legs (6) and/or the ring shaped support (2). 4. Vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-3, wherein each of the at least two legs (6) comprises two side faces (9a,9b) perpendicular to the dome shaped inner surface (8), the two side faces (9a,9b) having a different slope along the domed shaped inner surface (8). 5. Vitrectomy lens ring according to claim 4, wherein one slope of the two side faces (9a,9b) is a shallow slope. 6. Vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-3, wherein the at least two legs (6) have a side face (9b) of which the distance towards a center (O) of the lens ring (4) increases linearly over a rotation angle. 7. Vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-6, wherein the at least two legs (6) have a similar shape. 8. Vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-7, wherein four legs (6) are provided, of which two legs have a width smaller than the other two legs. 9. Vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-8, wherein the vitrectomy lens ring (1) is made of a soft plastic material. 10. Vitrectomy lens ring according to claim 9, wherein the vitrectomy lens ring (1) is made of a thermoplastic elastomer (TPE). 11. Vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-10, wherein the ring shaped support (2) has a lens receiving flange (2a), wherein the lens receiving flange (2a) of the ring shaped support (2) has a curvature of the dome shaped inner surface (8) with a transitory curvature (2b). 12. Method of manufacturing a vitrectomy lens ring according to any one of claims 1-11, wherein the vitrectomy lens is moulded using a mould, wherein the mould part corresponding to the dome shaped inner surface (8) part of the at least two legs (6) is provided with a surface texture having a surface roughness Ra of between 0.4Î¼Î¹Î· and 18 Î¼Î¹Î·, e.g. a surface roughness Ra of 2.2Î¼Î¹Î·. 13. Method according to claim 12, wherein the surface texture on the mould is provided by electrical erosion treatment, such as spark erosion or arc erosion. 14. Method according to claim 12, wherein the surface texture on the mould is provided by mechanical erosion treatment, such as sand blasting or glass bead blasting.
